evidence.claim: Bonus nuggets are manually awarded to individual students
evidence.fact: Manual bonus nuggets given to individual learners require a justification note that is stored in an immutable audit log.
evidence.user_story_span: Bonus nuggets are manually awarded to individual students.
evidence.fact_span: Manual bonus nuggets given to individual learners

evidence.claim: When the interaction occurs, the teacher grants a manual bonus nugget to a student with a written justification
evidence.fact: Educators are able to award extra nuggets manually to a particular student, and they must provide a written reason that gets recorded as an audit event.
evidence.user_story_span: grants a manual bonus nugget to a student with a written justification
evidence.fact_span: award extra nuggets manually to a particular student, and they must provide a written reason

evidence.fact: A teacher registers, signs in, and views a control panel showing live tests, enrollment figures, and skill coverage.
